feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Cloud Identity Services
feed.subtitle: SAP Cloud Identity Services Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Run Callback API after provisioning with SAP BTP IPS
entry.content:
Through SAP IPS, we want to provision user from the IDP system to SAP IAS. At this time, I want to send an email to each user by calling my nodeJS API using the list of provisioned users as a parameter. Can I put that script in IPS? Or should I do something else?

ex. Developed business logic to create a new API, call the IPS provisioning API, receive the result back, and call my email nodeJS API.

entry.title: How to establish SSO between SuccessFactors EC & ECPayroll?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have a requirement of establishing SSO between SuccessFactors & EC Payroll.

IAS is set up with Azure AD as corporate identifier.

Can someone provide guidance on this configuration.

Thanks

entry.title: Couldn't create an instance of Cloud Identity Services with plan Application
entry.content:
BTP Trial>subaccount>Service marketplace>click on create Cloud Identity Service>

Only choice available is Application, and not default. Even though Global Account shows both Application and default.

Creation Failed

Couldn't create an instance of service 'Cloud Identity Services' with plan 'application'.

Service broker error: Service broker identity-broker failed with: Service broker parameters are invalid: To use this service link an Identity Authentication tenant to the subaccount with the "Establish Trust" option. For more information: https://help.sap.com/viewer/65de2977205c403bbc107264b8eccf4b/Cloud/en-US/161f8f0cfac64c4fa2d973bc5f08a894.html

entry.title: custom logic between login and launchpad (IAS, Sap Build Work Zone)
entry.content:
Our company is developing an application for our dealers. Each dealer has different roles and therefore sees different tiles + an admin can give/take away roles.

After registration/login by IAS an event should be called which handles this logic. (based on an odata service in Sap).

How can this be implemented? We use the BTP with the Sap Build Work Zone and IAS. Is it possible to execute something between login and displaying the tiles?

entry.title: test question
entry.content: test question

entry.title: How can I get a list of administrators from the SAP Cloud Identity Services with API
entry.content:
Hi

I would like to read the administrators in SAP Cloud Identity Services with an API.
User works.
Groups works.
But I cannot determine which user has administrator authorizations.

Thank you for your help.
Maic

entry.title: When migrating from SuccessFactors to IAS, do email addresses need to be unique?
entry.content:
Hi

I am in the process of starting the migration from the Upgrade Center on SuccessFactors to IAS.
This is a basic question,
When migrating from SuccessFactors to IAS (even after migration), do email addresses need to be unique?
It is stated that KBAs, etc. must be unique, but do email addresses really have to be unique?

Since many of our users do not have email addresses, we currently have the same dummy address on SuccessFactors.

In the Logon Alias setting of IAS, it is possible to set the email address not to be Required/Unique.
I am thinking that by turning this off, it would be possible to log in to SuccessFactors via IAS without making the email address unique.

Or is there any obstacle if it is not unique?

Best Regards.

entry.title: Is it possible to see a report output of login history to IAS/IPS?
entry.content:
Hi,

We are migrating from SuccessFactors to IAS.
Currently, SuccessFactors uses a table report (Domain: Login Data) to view login history to SuccessFactors for auditing purposes.

After applying IAS/IPS, we need to check login history to IAS/IPS in the same way.
Is there any way to check who accessed the system and when?
If so, I would like to know how to do so.

Best Regards.

entry.title: Email address conversion process when syncing from SuccessFactors to IPS
entry.content:
Hi,
We are in the process of transitioning from SuccessFactors to IAS.
We are aware that when synchronizing from SuccessFactors to IPS, if the same dummy address is set, we can set a unique address on IPS/IAS by specifying that dummy address.
(https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PLATFORM/568fdf1f14f14fd089a3cd15194d19cc/f596827269d242e1b5d32ecb1d826cba.html? locale=en-US)

However, is there any way to prepare for the case where multiple users have duplicate real email addresses instead of the same dummy address?
In operation, there is a possibility that the same real e-mail address may be set for multiple users.

Best Regards.

SAP SuccessFactors HXM Core 
SAP Cloud Identity Services 
Identity Provisioning

entry.title: Using BTP IPS, is it possible to read data from tables or else other function modules for ABAP ?
entry.content:
Hello All,

I would like to understand Using IPS, is it possible to read data from standard tables or else other function modules? I remember using SAP IDM ABAP connector it is possible to read data from tables as well as execute function modules apart from the standard BAPI_USER_CHANGE or RFC_READ_TABLE etc.,

My requirement is to execute RFC enabled BAPI calls like RFC_READ_TABLE/RSAU_READ_LOG and expose the data as the Proxy api. Currently i am able to connect SAP ABAP NW 7.5 system to IPS as a proxy and able to read the roles, users and perform provisioning activities related to user using the Proxy api's .

entry.title: SAML 2.0 Signing certificate renewal for Ariba Sourcing- service provider certificate
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,
we received a notification for SP provider certificate renewal for Ariba sourcing. We are using SAP IAS as IdP, and I tried to renew the certificate on Ariba side, but there is no way to do so , same for creating a new outbound connection, but certificate validity is same as the old one. How do I renew the signing certificate? as it then done by Ariba team? because I am not able to find a way to do so. 
also is there a way to remove / delete the outbound connection created in Ariba? 

 

 



Thanks and best regards,
Imtiaz

entry.title: How to set default user parameter for sap s/4hana private edit via SAP IPS
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are using SAP ips to provision user from azure AD to our SAP s/4hana private edition.

One of our business processes required default user parameters (as maintained on su3/su01).

We tried to find any documentation how to set it on the transformation but not find anything.

Does anyone maybe know how to do it?

Thank in advance.

SAP Cloud Identity Services 

SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud

entry.title: Source Transformation for IAS
entry.content:
Hello,

we are trying to connect IAS to FSM via IPS, IAS source transformation pulls complete user and groups from IAS, so we added attribute ias.group.filter = displayName eq 'FSM' to restrict group and in source transformation below condition :

{
"user": {
"condition": "$.groups[?(@.value == 'FSM')] EMPTY false",
"mappings": [

Groups are correctly pulled but all users within that group are skipped.

entry.title: No entity found in FSM - Error log - SAP FSM
entry.content:
Hello,

we are trying to connect IAS to FSM via IPS for user provisioning and are receiving below message in IPS log :

error=No entity found by https://us.coresystems.net/api/scim/v2/Groups?filter=displayName eq "YTEST"

YTEST is the group and its already created in FSM admin policy and IAS.

User are getting created in FSM but groups are not getting mapped to the users.

entry.title: Corp IDP with Open ID Connect
entry.content:
Hi All,

in IAS, Can you please suggest if OpenID Connect option set for CorporateIDP exempts the SAML Configuration for the same.

Regards

Plaban

entry.title: SSO RISE SAP
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

my client is looking for implementing SSO in SAPGUI in a RISE Cloud Solution by using Secure Login Service through SAP IAS.

After taking a look through several SAP articles and guides on internet, I have nor been able to locate a clear guide to implement such a solution.

May any of you have access to a document or something similar to guide me through this process?

Thanks in advance.

Best regards.

entry.title: Some employees are not being synced to IAS/IPS from SuccessFactors, not included on skip/error log
entry.content:
Hello,

Some employees are not being synced to IAS/IPS and do not appear on the error or skip logs. There are no filters set to exclude these users, their data in SuccessFactors is unique, and we do not have IAS for ONB enabled. Has anyone encountered this issue? If so, what was the fix? Any insight on what may be the cause is greatly appreciated!

Thank you,

Sydnie

entry.title: Is it possible to create a new user (not admin) from the CDC (Customer Data Cloud) portal manually?
entry.content:
Hi there,
I am trying to create a user manually from the CDC (Customer Data Cloud) portal. I can easily create admin users and add privilege to the admin user. But can't seem to find an option to add a new normal user and put that user in a group that I have created.

In CIS (Cloud Identity Service) it is straight forward and easy to create a new user and assign the user in a group. But can't seem to find similar thing in CDC.
It would be much appreciated if anyone points me to the right direction.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: SAP Datasphere IDP, IAS protocol support?
entry.content:
We can switch some BTP Services to use OIDC with IAS, a simpler method than Saml. However, SAP Datasphere seems limited to Saml. Is this because it's built on older tech not supporting OIDC?
I reviewed this link: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/9f804b8efa8043539289f42f372c4862/9b26536159354IAS, OIDCaea9024a99cbbe60b4e.html?q=sap%20datasphere%20SAC

Action & Inquiry

  • Seeking to confirm if anyone has successfully integrated IAS OIDC with SAP Datasphere.
  • Advise on next steps for using IAS OIDC for SAP Datasphere.

Appreciate any guidance,

Wallace

entry.title: How to get an audit log of more than 1000 accesses using Postman
entry.content:
I would like to know how to get an audit log of more than 1000 accesses using Postman.
I used the KBA instructions below to get the audit log data.
https://me.sap.com/notes/2913940

However, they were only able to obtain 1000 accesses of data in a single run.

I want to get more than 1000 data. Can you tell me how to remove the upper limit?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
